svg.title: Synalux POS — reservations
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for reservations. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Window seat preferred, anniversary — flowers arranged
Called ahead, confirmed flowers with staff

pos_reservations → pos_tables assignment. SMS/email via Twilio on confirm + 2h reminder. OpenTable/Resy sync via webhook (pos_reservation_source). Waitlist timer recalculates on every table_cleared event. Loyalty auto-detected by phone match to pos_customers.
